description: Add evaluator-loop gates: task acceptance fields, scripts/verify_cycle.sh, runtime completion rule
acceptance: New tasks can carry explicit acceptance criteria without breaking scripts/task.sh list/move/show.
A repo-level verifier script checks JSON validity, required handoff files, task queue consistency, and no obvious tracked secret in the current diff.
prompts/runtime.md requires running the verifier or recording why it does not apply before moving a task to completed.
docs/LOOP_DESIGN.md remains the source note for the loop mapping and autonomy levels.
notes: Implements ADR-009. Keep the first pass shell/jq-native; do not add multi-agent orchestration yet.
